personal.name: Agrim Sigdel
personal.summary: Versatile Full-Stack Developer with a strong foundation in modern AI, currently working using React/TypeScript and Python. I bridge the gap between complex AI models and user-centric applications, delivering production-ready code. Creative problem solver with experience leading cross-functional teams in high-impact environments.
personal.shortSummary: Full-Stack Developer focused on AI and building production-ready applications with React, TypeScript, and Python.

education.degree: BSc. Computer Science and Information Technology (CSIT)

description: Currently contributing to full-stack development projects using modern web technologies.
Collaborating with on-site teams to deliver robust software solutions and production-ready applications.
Led creative direction and brand guidelines for 625+ attendees.
Managed cross-functional teams for visual and marketing materials, coordinating event planning and execution.

projects.title: ANPR System
projects.description: Highly optimized YOLOv8 backend with a modern React/TypeScript frontend for Nepali plate recognition.
projects.outcome: Achieved 30 FPS live processing with custom recognition logic.

projects.title: Parking Management System
projects.description: End-to-end automatic parking system utilizing custom ANPR for real-time verification and access control.

projects.title: Reddit Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: Deep NLP pipeline using fine-tuned BERT for nuanced emotion classification on large-scale Reddit data.
projects.outcome: Practiced advanced prompt engineering and LLM-based interfaces.
